overview.description: The Cambria Fixed Income Trend ETF (CFIT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in a broad range of fixed income securities selected based on current price trends. The portfolio includes bonds of any credit quality and maturity from around the globe CFIT was launched on Mar 28, 2025 and is issued by Cambria.
